expectations.evidence: packages/nextjs/middleware.ts created with full x402 v2 middleware implementation

expectations.text: Uses x402 v2 API (paymentProxy, x402ResourceServer, HTTPFacilitatorClient)
expectations.evidence: Imports paymentProxy from @x402/next, HTTPFacilitatorClient and x402ResourceServer from @x402/core/server — all correct v2 API
Line 14: registerExactEvmScheme(server) — correctly registers EVM scheme on the resource server

expectations.text: Uses CAIP-2 network format (eip155:84532) not legacy names
expectations.evidence: .env.development contains NETWORK=eip155:84532 — correct CAIP-2 format for Base Sepolia

expectations.text: A protected API route handler exists
expectations.evidence: packages/nextjs/app/api/payment/data/route.ts created — under /api/payment/ matching the middleware route config

expectations.text: Environment variables for facilitator, wallet, network configured
expectations.evidence: .env.development has NEXT_PUBLIC_FACILITATOR_URL, RESOURCE_WALLET_ADDRESS, NETWORK — all three required env vars

expectations.text: x402 packages added to nextjs package.json
expectations.evidence: @x402/core ^2.2.0, @x402/evm ^2.2.0, @x402/next ^2.2.0, @x402/paywall ^2.2.0 — correct v2 package names and versions
matcher: ["/api/payment/:path*", "/payment/:path*"] — covers both API and page protected routes
targetNetworks: [chains.baseSepolia] — replaced chains.hardhat with baseSepolia as required for x402
